rows.label: qev099701_MSG0001
rows.name: Hey there! You! Dreamboat![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev099701_MSG0002
rows.name:
I've got a line on a tasty
little job. You interested?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev099701_MSG0003
rows.name: Preeeetty sure you won't regret it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev099701_JNK0010
rows.name: Listen

rows.label: qev099701_SEL0011
rows.name: Hear Lara Mara out.

rows.label: qev099701_JNK0020
rows.name: Ignore

rows.label: qev099701_SEL0021
rows.name: Decide it sounds shady and walk away.

rows.label: qev099701_MSG0004
rows.name: Curious, are we?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev099701_MSG0005
rows.name:
I do love a [ST:gender p1=boy p2=girl ] with an open mind and a go-getter
attitude. Besides, where's the fun in being
a BLADE if you're not making money?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev099701_MSG0006
rows.name:
Rude! And after I told you
you wouldn't regret it, too![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev099701_MSG0007
rows.name:
The least you could do
is hear me out. Sheesh![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev099701_MSG0008
rows.name:
Or is this you playing
hard to get? You sly dog![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev099701_MSG0009
rows.name:
I'm afraid that won't work on me,
sugar. Now be a good [ST:gender p1=boy p2=girl ] and listen.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev099701_MSG0010
rows.name:
I've got a mission direct from
Commander Vandham, you see.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev099701_MSG0011
rows.name:
A new Lifepoint unit's been
spotted in White Woods.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev099701_MSG0012
rows.name:
Anyway, I was hoping a strapping young thing
like you could help out with the investigation
and recovery. ...See? Told you it was juicy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev099701_MSG0013
rows.name:
Not that this job doesn't come
with a laundry list of questions.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev099701_MSG0014
rows.name:
Like why we're only noticing
the thing now... Or why the
Growth haven't touched it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev099701_MSG0015
rows.name:
All part of the fun of investigating,
I suppose! It's jobs like this where
we BLADEs earn our salt.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev099701_MSG0016
rows.name:
There are some unknowns, sure,
but I'd still file this job
in the easy end of things.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev099701_MSG0017
rows.name:
So there you go and you're
welcome. Best of luck, tiger.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev099701_MSG0018
rows.name:
I still think it's strange that
the Growth haven't noticed a
Lifepoint unit in White Woods.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev099701_MSG0019
rows.name:
I suppose we don't have a complete
picture of their tech level yet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev099701_MSG0020
rows.name:
Maybe our radar and surveillance game
is just that much better than theirs?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev099701_MSG0021
rows.name:
I imagine that sort of gap could end up
making trouble for us, but such is life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev099701_MSG0022
rows.name:
At least this time it's
working in our favor![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev099701_MSG0023
rows.name:
Hmm? What's up? Did you find the access
code to get into that Lifepoint unit?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev099701_MSG0024
rows.name: ...What? That code was a Growth trap?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev099701_MSG0025
rows.name:
Ugh, that is LOW! I hope you go mop the
floor with every last one of them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev099701_MSG0026
rows.name:
Go stomp those slimy bastards and
bring that Lifepoint data home![ST:wait ]
